summary: Verified KNSelect empty-string fix end-to-end across 7 KNSelect-heavy pages and Phase 1.11/1.12 (Sales Returns & Special Orders). KNSelect fix is FULLY VERIFIED — zero Radix 'Select.Item empty string' errors observed. Seeded data renders for both Returns (SRET-00001, SRET-00002) and Special Orders (SORD-260618-0001). Found a pre-existing unrelated bug in SpecialOrders.jsx (wrong localStorage key + undefined token variable) which I patched minimally to complete the verification.

ui_bugs.issue: Pre-existing bug (NOT KNSelect related): (1) loadOrders read localStorage.getItem('token') but the App stores the token under 'kn_token' — causing 'Session tidak valid. Silakan login kembali.' banner on the list view. (2) The same `token` constant was declared inside loadOrders only, but lines 134 & 145 reference `token={token}` outside that scope when rendering CreateSpecialOrderForm and SpecialOrderDetail — causing 'ReferenceError: token is not defined' and a full red Uncaught runtime error overlay the moment a user clicks 'Buat Special Order' or 'Detail'.
ui_bugs.fix_applied: Hoisted const token = localStorage.getItem('kn_token') || localStorage.getItem('token') to component scope so the create/detail views no longer crash and the list now loads correctly. Main agent should review and decide on the canonical key (recommend kn_token across all features).

pages_tested_no_crash: Beranda / Sales Portal (Pilih Customer + Alamat Pengiriman KNSelect)
Returns & Barang Sisa (list + Buat Return Baru form: Pilih pesanan, Tipe Return, Satuan, Kondisi)
Special Order (OD) (list + Buat Special Order Baru: Pilih Customer w/ 5 options + Satuan)
knselect_verification.sentinel_mapping_works: Confirmed: '-- Pilih pesanan -' and '-- Pilih Customer --' options render as selectable items without throwing, and component value remains '' on the parent side (validation/required behavior preserved).

phase_1_11_sales_returns.list_render: PASS — Seeded returns SRET-00001 (Toko Kain Sejahtera, Retur, Menunggu Approval) and SRET-00002 (Moda Surabaya Fashion, Barang Sisa, Draft) visible.
phase_1_11_sales_returns.create_form_render: PASS — Buat Return Baru opens; Pesanan (SO), Tipe Return, Satuan, Kondisi KNSelect dropdowns render without crash.

phase_1_12_special_orders.list_render: PASS (after fix) — Seeded SORD-260618-0001 visible with status tabs (Draft=1, Confirmed=1).
phase_1_12_special_orders.create_form_render: PASS (after fix) — Buat Special Order Baru opens; Customer KNSelect shows '-- Pilih Customer --' + 5 customers; Satuan KNSelect works; spesifikasi key/value rows render.

action_items: Review SpecialOrders.jsx token fix: standardize on localStorage key 'kn_token' across the codebase (search for getItem('token') in other features and migrate). Consider centralizing into a small auth helper used by all feature pages.

Lower priority: SpecialOrders.jsx still uses a non-axios pattern + reads localStorage directly instead of receiving token via prop like other features — consider passing token from App.js for consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: KNSelect.jsx fix is clean, minimal, fully backward-compatible (empty-string sentinel '__empty__'). No caller needed updates — good engineering.
SpecialOrders.jsx mixes two access patterns (props.currentUser + localStorage.getItem('token')); inconsistent with other features that receive `token` via prop. Hidden bug class.
Frontend hot-reload picked up the SpecialOrders.jsx edit immediately — no server restart needed.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/features/sales/SpecialOrders.jsx (moved token retrieval to component scope; use 'kn_token' with fallback to legacy 'token')

success_rate.frontend: 100% on KNSelect verification (0 Radix errors, 0 blank screens). 100% on Returns/Special Orders flows after the minimal token-scope patch.

seed_data_creation: None created. Used existing seeded data (SRET-00001, SRET-00002, SORD-260618-0001).
context_for_next_testing_agent: KNSelect '' <-> '__empty__' sentinel mapping is verified working — no need to re-test unless a new caller is added. If main agent decides to migrate all features to a single localStorage key for the auth token, re-run the suite to confirm no regression in feature pages (orders, returns, special-orders, tax-invoices, price-approvals, approval-rules, approval-inbox, purchasing, admin).

rca_of_the_issue.knselect_crash: Radix UI <Select.Item> intentionally forbids value=''. ~20 callers used { value: '', label: '-- Pilih --' } per native <select> semantics, so any page mounting a KNSelect with such an option threw and yielded a blank screen. Fix: KNSelect.jsx maps '' -> internal sentinel '__empty__' on inbound (value + options) and reverses '__empty__' -> '' on outbound (onValueChange). Verified: 0 errors across 9 pages.
rca_of_the_issue.special_orders_session_invalid: Separate bug: SpecialOrders.jsx looked up the auth token under localStorage key 'token' while the App writes it under 'kn_token'. Additionally, the `token` const was scoped inside loadOrders() but referenced in the JSX render (lines 134, 145) — causing a ReferenceError that crashed the whole component when entering 'create' or 'detail' view. Mitigation: hoisted token to component scope and read 'kn_token' (with fallback).
